creator: smbeare@netcomuk.co.uk
text:
Boot will not 'see' my CD-Rom, which is a Panasonic 562, with an interface from a Prosonic 16 sound card
.  This hardware works fine under MS-Dos, but even with manual configuration, I cannot set it up to see
the CD-Rom.  The sound card's Base Address is 220, with an IRQ of 5, auto-config won't see this, the
CD-Rom is set up for Base 330.

HELP!!
